headline: Dow jumps 800 points, S&P 500 at new record, Nasdaq gains 6.8% this week
summary: All three of the market indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Friday's session with significant gains, led by the Dow Jones Industrial Average which rose by nearly 868 points (1.79%) in the day. The S&P 500 ended the trading week 4.5% higher while the Nasdaq Composite surged by 6.84%. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre notes the fresh record highs for US stocks.

headline: Barclays Raises Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Price Target on Strong Pharma Momentum
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is included among the 10 Healthcare Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 15, Barclays analyst Matt Miksic raised the firm’s price recommendation on Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) to $255 from $234. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. headline: Is It Time To Reassess Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) After Recent Litigation Headlines?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Johnson & Johnson's current share price reflects its true value, this breakdown is designed to help you make sense of where the stock stands today. The stock currently trades at US$234.54, with returns of 13.1% year to date and 53.1% over the past year, while the last 7 days and 30 days show 2.8% and 1.5% declines respectively. Recent headlines have focused on Johnson & Johnson's ongoing product portfolio developments and legal matters, which continue to...
